invalid (alpha) keeps parent depth: [] invalid (negative) keeps parent depth: [] invalid (decimal) keeps parent depth: [] invalid (above documented maximum) keeps parent depth: [] invalid (huge uint64 value) keeps parent depth: [] invalid (beyond uint64) keeps parent depth: [] valid override above parent depth honours parent: [] valid override at parent depth matches parent: [] empty max-depth is treated as no override: [] whitespace-only max-depth is treated as no override: []
